sentences.english: I've moved five times in the last ten years.
I'm so tired of packing and unpacking boxes.
sentences.korean: 짐을 싸고 푸는 게 너무 지겨워요.

sentences.english: The worst part about moving is changing your address everywhere.
sentences.korean: 이사에서 가장 안 좋은 부분은 모든 곳의 주소를 바꾸는 거예요.

sentences.english: The bank, the hospital, your driver's license — it never ends.
It feels like a fresh start every time.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
